turn_inference.skill_2_schedule_assumption: Vulcanus S2 counter increments on attack events 6,12,18,... when present.

stats_capture.note: Only visible Attack/Defense panel rows are captured from the PDF screenshots; Lethality/Health panel rows were not visible.

normalization_notes.warning: Do not derive base formula directly from observed turns without backing out battle skills and missing Lethality/Health panel rows.
normalization_notes.troop_passive_rule: Infantry->Lancer Master Brawler +10% DD; Lancer->Marksman Charge +10% DD; Marksman->Infantry Ranged Strike +10% DD. Directional by attacker class and target class.

notes: Vulcanus vs Vulcanus; attacker S3 row is blank/not displayed. Heavy Marksman hero-stat contamination.
_extraction: Extracted by Codex from PDF render on 2026-07-10.

notes: T1 troop passives are deterministic Damage Dealt modifiers keyed to target class.
They affect formula normalization for cross-class rows; same-class rows usually have no active T1 target passive.
